redroot_potion.name: Redroot Potion
redroot_potion.description: A bitter draught that restores health over several breaths.

ash_bomb.description: A clay bomb packed with ash-salt and sparkstone.

iron_trap.name: Iron Trap
iron_trap.description: A sprung jaw that slows beasts long enough to strike.
